search.title: Search and understand words
search.description: This will become the main search page of the DeutschLabor Dictionary.

training.title: Review words with focus
training.description: This will become the training area for searched and saved words.

account.title: Your personal area
account.description: This will become the area for profile, language settings and security.

login.title: Log in to DeutschLabor
login.description: This will become the passkey login page.

register.title: Create a DeutschLabor account
register.description: Create your account with email and passkey. In the next step your device will create a secure passkey.

email.label: Email
email.error: Please enter a valid email address.

messages.creatingPasskey: Confirm passkey creation in the browser window or on your device.
messages.registered: Your account was created. You are now signed in to DeutschLabor. We sent you an email to verify your address.

errors.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email address is already registered.
errors.forbiddenOrigin: This origin is not allowed for registration.
errors.registrationSessionNotFound: The registration session was not found. Start registration again.
errors.registrationSessionExpired: The registration session has expired. Start registration again.
errors.passkeyUnsupported: This browser or device does not support passkeys.
errors.passkeyInvalidState: A passkey for this account may already exist on this device.

passkeyInfo.title: What happens next?
passkeyInfo.text: After submitting the form, the browser will ask your device to create a passkey. Then the registration will be completed on the server.

passkeyModal.title: Create account with passkey
passkeyModal.intro: DeutschLabor does not use a password. Instead, your device creates a passkey — a secure access key for your account.
passkeyModal.browserDialog: After clicking the button, the browser will open a passkey creation window. You can confirm the action with your phone, Windows Hello, Face ID, Touch ID, PIN, or another method supported by your device.
passkeyModal.privacy: DeutschLabor does not receive your fingerprint, Face ID, or PIN. This data stays on your device. Only the public key is stored on the server.
